metadata.description: All-in-one workflow plugin for Claude Code. Engineering discipline (TDD, verification, code review), design quality (critique, polish, normalize), and project tracking (phases, milestones, roadmaps) in a single install.

plugins.name: fhhs-skills
plugins.description: Composite workflow skills unifying engineering discipline, design quality, and project tracking. Includes /plan, /build, /fix, /verify, /critique, /polish, and 40+ more commands.
